title: Kureha Treats Nami and Sanji
description: On pages 4–6, kureha treats nami and sanji as luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return.
scene: Kureha Treats Nami and Sanji. Luffy reaches Dr. Kureha’s castle and meets Chopper, while the people below continue resisting Wapol’s return. The focus is the story beat, character decisions, and dialogue driving this part.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Ice- Water Swim- Ming!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, and I surprisingly saw some fish swimming in the freezing river so I thought it'd be cool to chase after it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But then afterwards, I got lost so I started walking in one direction and before I knew it, I was lost in this forest...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: How stupid could you get!?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Whatever, just lend me your coat, Usopp.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wonder if Nami's illness had anything to do with mental stress and exhaustion from dealing with her crewmates...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Oh hell no.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Then at least your boots...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...even a single one'll do!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Tough luck, buddy.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Look!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: There's a whole group of people gathered there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, those houses look familiar...

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Ah, you're right! Then that means... We're at Bighorn Village!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: We must've come back to where we started!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Yo, what's going on?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: What's going on with you and your half-naked body!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The avalanche buried Dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But these bastards won't let us dig him out of there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What!? Dalton was...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Beat it, peasants! Dalton's already dead so deal with it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: As if Dalton could die that easily!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: And you're his former subordinates, don't you have any shred of compassion!?

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: We're servants to one man only, and that's King Wapol!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Any who goes against his majesty's will is as good as dead!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Usopp, I think we've seen those uniforms once before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Those guys were the ones we met on the sea some time ago, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Uh, yeah...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: So then they're enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Well, am I right!? Are they enemies or not!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Uh yeah, they're enemies but I don't see what you're so impatient about...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If you've got any complaints, feel free to step forth! Or do you not even have that much courage now that your precious dalton's dead? Hahahaha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: NGHH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: What

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Mr. Bushido!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Who!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hey, you! Stop or they'll...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: AHAHAHAHA! Man, this is warm!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You attacked us just for that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Kill him!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Great, now you've gone and pissed all of'em off.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: These guys just never learn, do they...

summary: This part centers on kureha treats nami and sanji, clarifying the immediate conflict and how it moves the chapter toward its next major turn.
